description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows 8.1) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should have read-only repository contents permission. It should use a matrix strategy to run on Windows 2019 and 2022 with various build configurations, installing Ninja, setting up the MSVC development environment, configuring and building with CMake, and cleaning up after each build.
